channel.title: Nordstrom on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Nordstrom as a Sales Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to the Nordstrom sales associate role, covering commission structure, hourly pay, daily duties, and honest employee experiences.
